title: High Molecular Weight DNA Extraction from Cannabis sativa for Long-Read Sequencing
author: Brett Pike

steps.title: Select young shoot tips (preferred tissue type) _Optional
steps.instruction: Select young shoot tips (preferred tissue type) _Optional: Incubate plants in darkness for 3 days prior to extraction to reduce carbohydrate content_

steps.title: Divide 1g fresh tissue among six 2mL tubes with 2
steps.instruction: Divide 1g fresh tissue among six 2mL tubes with 2.8mm metal beads, OR use one 7mL tube with 2.8mm metal beads

steps.title: Snap-freeze tissue in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Snap-freeze tissue in liquid nitrogen

steps.title: Homogenize frozen samples using Precellys Evolution...
steps.instruction: Homogenize frozen samples using Precellys Evolution at 6,200 RPM for 5 seconds _Tip: Keep samples frozen until homogenization to minimize nuclease activity._

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.6 mL Nuclei Isolation Buffer (NIB) to each tube and resuspend thoroughly _Note: Buffer will likely freeze on contact with frozen sample_

steps.title: Incubate with gentle shaking at room temperature for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate with gentle shaking at room temperature for 15 minutes

steps.title: Filter sample sequentially through 60 μm...
steps.instruction: Filter sample sequentially through 60 μm filter, then 30 μm filter into new 2 mL tubes

steps.title: Pellet nuclei by centrifugation at 1,500g...
steps.instruction: Pellet nuclei by centrifugation at 1,500g for 1 minute at 4°C. Remove supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 1 mL ice-cold NIB by pipetting
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 1 mL ice-cold NIB by pipetting

steps.title: Repeat steps 4-5 until supernatant is...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 4-5 until supernatant is absolutely clear (typically 2-5 washes)

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 1 mL ice-cold...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 1 mL ice-cold Homogenization Buffer (HB) and centrifuge at 1,500g for 1 minute at 4°C

steps.title: Remove HB and either proceed to...
steps.instruction: Remove HB and either proceed to DNA purification or store nuclei pellet at -80°C _Checkpoint: Nuclei pellet should be free of green pigmentation and supernatant should be clear_

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei pellet in 30 μL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei pellet in 30 μL Proteinase K and vortex strongly for 20 seconds _Critical: Ensure thorough resuspension so each nucleus is surrounded by proteinase_

steps.title: Add 400 μL Edward's buffer and...
steps.instruction: Add 400 μL Edward's buffer and vortex briefly to mix _Important: Beyond this point DNA is fragile. Use wide-bore tips and handle gently._

steps.title: Incubate at 65°C for 30 minutes to 2 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65°C for 30 minutes to 2 hours

steps.title: Pellet cellular debris at 12,000g for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Pellet cellular debris at 12,000g for 5 minutes

steps.title: Transfer 400 μL supernatant to new tube, avoiding pellet
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 μL supernatant to new tube, avoiding pellet

steps.title: Add 200 μL of 1M KCl,...
steps.instruction: Add 200 μL of 1M KCl, mix by gentle inversion, and incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000g for 5 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000g for 5 minutes and transfer 500 μL supernatant to new tube

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 μL RNase, mix by inversion, and incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes

steps.title: Add 500 μL chloroform and incubate...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL chloroform and incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes with occasional inversion (perform in fume hood)

steps.title: Separate phases at 5,000g for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Separate phases at 5,000g for 1 minute

steps.title: Transfer 400 μL aqueous (upper) layer to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 μL aqueous (upper) layer to new tube. Do not disturb precipitate at interphase.

steps.title: Add 200 μL saturated NaCl and mix by gentle inversion
steps.instruction: Add 200 μL saturated NaCl and mix by gentle inversion

steps.title: Add 600 μL 95% ethanol and mix by inversion
steps.instruction: Add 600 μL 95% ethanol and mix by inversion. DNA gel should become visible.

steps.title: Hook out DNA using plastic inoculation...
steps.instruction: Hook out DNA using plastic inoculation loop or p200 tip and transfer to tube with 1 mL 70% ethanol

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes

steps.title: Hook DNA into another tube with...
steps.instruction: Hook DNA into another tube with 1 mL fresh 70% ethanol

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1,000g for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1,000g for 1 minute

steps.title: Remove ethanol and air dry DNA...
steps.instruction: Remove ethanol and air dry DNA gel at room temperature for 30 minutes (gel should appear clear)

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 μL EB buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 μL EB buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0, no EDTA)

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature overnight to...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature overnight to allow DNA to relax before quality control _Final Checkpoint: DNA should be in solution and appear viscous_

steps.title: Yield
steps.instruction: Yield: ~4 μg HMW DNA per 1g young Cannabis sativa shoots Quality Metrics: - 260/280 ratio: ~1.8 (indicating pure DNA) - 260/230 ratio: e2.0 (indicating removal of contaminants) DNA Integrity: Should show high molecular weight fragments (�3e50 kb) suitable for Oxford Nanopore and PacBio sequencing
